decisions: Prioritize the removal of the legacy nimbus code path over new feature development for the rest of the week.
meetings.notes: Dan Davis raised a critical concern regarding STORM-1. The deadline is May 30, but the legacy nimbus code path is heavily entangled with the core processing logic. There is a very high risk of missing the deadline.
meetings.content:
## Decisions
- Prioritize the removal of the legacy nimbus code path over new feature development for the rest of the week.

## Action Items
- **STORM-1** (@dan.davis): Remove legacy nimbus code path. Status: in_progress. Due: 2025-05-30.

## Notes
Dan Davis raised a critical concern regarding STORM-1. The deadline is May 30, but the legacy nimbus code path is heavily entangled with the core processing logic. There is a very high risk of missing the deadline.

intended_anomalies: DEADLINE_RISK: STORM-1 is explicitly called out as a deadline risk in the meeting notes (due in 2 days).

decisions: Delay the Netty 4.2 upgrade until the client migration script is fully tested.

meetings.content:
## Decisions
- Delay the Netty 4.2 upgrade until the client migration script is fully tested.

Henry noted that ZOOKEEPER-1 remains blocked due to Netty 4.2 compatibility issues. Thi Nga is actively working on ZOOKEEPER-2, but since it's a blocker for the upcoming release and due on May 31, it requires immediate attention.

decisions: Investigate the serialization layer bottleneck before approving the PR.

No update for over a week. Minh Tuan confirmed he has not touched this ticket since May 19. Marked as stalled — requires status update by EOD tomorrow.
Due tomorrow (2025-05-30). Implementation is still in progress. High risk of missing deadline. Alice flagged this as a deadline risk.

blockers.description: Cannot upgrade ingestion-pipeline Netty until concern-engine Netty upgrade (AIP-67) is resolved.

meetings.notes:
Four critical items were discussed.

(1) CROSS-SOURCE CONFLICT — AIP-30: Van Long clarified that the dependency update PR is still awaiting review and has not been merged. The ticket must NOT be marked as Done in Jira yet. If Jira shows Done, that is incorrect and needs to be corrected.

(2) STALLED — AIP-37: Minh Tuan has not updated the concern-engine migration script ticket since May 19 — 10 days with no activity. The team agreed this is stalled and needs an update by EOD 2025-05-29.

(3) DEADLINE RISK — AIP-53: The auto-scaling feature is due 2025-05-30 (tomorrow). Status is still In Progress. Alice Wang flagged this as a deadline risk requiring immediate attention.

(4) BLOCKER — AIP-67: The Netty 4.2 upgrade for concern-engine is blocking AIP-14 (ingestion-pipeline Netty upgrade). AIP-67 has been open as a blocker for 5 days with no resolution.
meetings.content:
## Decisions
- AIP-30 dependency update is still pending final review — do NOT close in Jira yet.
- AIP-37 migration script must have an update by EOD 2025-05-29 or will be escalated.
- AIP-53 auto-scaling feature is at high risk — due tomorrow, still In Progress.
- AIP-67 Netty upgrade is a critical blocker for AIP-14 — needs immediate resolution.

## Action Items
- **AIP-30** (@van.long): Update report-agent dependencies — pending review, not yet merged. Status: in_progress. Due: 2025-05-30.
- **AIP-37** (@minh.tuan): Write concern-engine migration script. Status: in_progress (STALLED — no update since 2025-05-19). Due: 2025-06-21.
- **AIP-53** (@hoang.nam): Allow ingestion-pipeline to auto-scale replicas. Status: in_progress. Due: 2025-05-30.
- **AIP-67** (@van.long): Upgrade concern-engine to use Netty 4.2. Status: blocked. Due: 2025-07-04.

## Blockers
- **AIP-67** is blocking **AIP-14**: Cannot upgrade ingestion-pipeline Netty until concern-engine Netty upgrade is resolved. (@van.long)

## Notes
CROSS-SOURCE CONFLICT: AIP-30 is marked Done in Jira but the PR is still pending review and has NOT been merged. STALLED: AIP-37 has had no update since 2025-05-19 (10 days). DEADLINE RISK: AIP-53 is due tomorrow (2025-05-30) and still in progress. BLOCKER: AIP-67 has been blocking AIP-14 for 5 days with no resolution.

intended_anomalies: CROSS_SOURCE_CONFLICT: AIP-30 is marked Done in Jira (resolved 2025-05-26) but meeting notes confirm it is still in_progress / pending merge.
STALLED: AIP-37 has been In Progress since 2025-05-19 — 10 days with no update, exceeding STALLED_DAYS=3.
DEADLINE_RISK: AIP-53 is due 2025-05-30 (1 day from meeting date) and status is still In Progress.
BLOCKER: AIP-67 blocks AIP-14 and has been open for 5 days, exceeding BLOCKER_OPEN_DAYS=2.
